description: Record an outbound delivery of securities (gifting shares) in Portfolio Performance using the loaded file gift_transfer_portfolio.xml. Document the gift of 50 shares of Apple Inc (AAPL) from the 'Schwab Brokerage' account to an external recipient. Record a 'Delivery (Outbound)' transaction for 50 shares on 2024-12-15 with a total value of $12,250.00. Save the updated portfolio file.
